meaning: adj.赎回的,挽回的,用于补偿的
examples: To many people, husband and wife alone do not seem a proper family—they need children to enrich the circle, to validate its family character, to gather the redemptive influence of offspring.
Salvation comes through faith in Christ's redemptive sacrifice.
Yet there were many moments of redemptive glory in his great struggle.
The scare seems to have changed Jobs--always before the dark genius--in a redemptive way.
He spoke in an exhausted snarl, all redemptive possibility purged from his voice and manner.
